client_construction.code: c, err := sarama.NewConsumer([]string{brokers}, nil); if err != nil { return nil, err }; pc, err := c.ConsumePartition(topic, 0, sarama.OffsetNewest); if err != nil { return nil, err }

primary_operations.name: ConsumeRaw
primary_operations.sdk_call: msg, ok := <-k.pc.Messages(); if !ok { return nil, sarama.ErrClosedClient }; return msg.Value, nil

code_style_notes: PartitionConsumer.Messages() is a Go channel — closed channel signals shutdown
Use ConsumerGroup for cooperative consumption across instances
